input.prompt:
[CONTEXT]: User wants to configure @whisperopencode/push - a push notification plugin for OpenCode (github.com/nicholasgrass/opencode). They don't understand how to set it up.
[GOAL]: Find complete setup/configuration documentation, README, and usage guides for @whisperopencode/push npm package.
[DOWNSTREAM]: I'll use this to explain the full setup process to the user.
[REQUEST]: Search for:
1. The npm package page for @whisperopencode/push
2. GitHub repo for whisperopencode/push or similar
3. Any documentation about pairing, relay servers, device management
4. The opencode plugin system documentation (how plugins work)
5. Any blog posts or guides about setting up push notifications with opencode
Return ALL findings with URLs and key details.

[CONTEXT]: User wants to configure @whisperopencode/push push notification plugin for OpenCode.
[GOAL]: Find the actual source code of the plugin to understand its configuration options, relay server, and pairing flow.
[DOWNSTREAM]: I'll use the source code to explain exactly how to configure the plugin.
[REQUEST]: Search GitHub for:
1. Repository: search for "whisperopencode" organization or user on GitHub
2. Repository: search for "opencode-push" or "@whisperopencode/push" on GitHub
3. Look at the npm package contents - what files does @whisperopencode/push contain
4. Search for any "opencode push notification" or "opencode push plugin" repos
5. Check if github.com/nicholasgrass has a push plugin repo
Return file paths, source code snippets of config/setup logic, and any README content.

[CONTEXT]: User wants to understand how OpenCode plugins work, specifically the push notification plugin @whisperopencode/push.
[GOAL]: Find documentation about OpenCode's plugin system - how to install, configure, and use plugins.
[DOWNSTREAM]: I'll explain the plugin setup process step by step.
[REQUEST]: Search for:
1. OpenCode official documentation about plugins (github.com/nicholasgrass/opencode or opencode.ai docs)
2. How the "plugin" field in opencode.jsonc works
3. Any plugin configuration examples
4. The opencode schema at opencode.ai/config.json for plugin-related keys
5. Any guides or discussions about OpenCode plugins
Return complete documentation excerpts and examples.
